sections.paragraph:
λείχω fut. 3 pl. λείξουσιν; aor. ἔλειξαν LXX (Aeschyl., Hdt.+; LXX) lick τὶ someth., of dogs (3 Km 20:19) Lk 16:21 v.l. B. 267.—DELG.

fut. fut. = fut.

  1. pl. = plural

aor. aor. = aorist

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Aeschyl Aeschyl , V b.c.—List 5

Hdt. Hdt. = Herodotus, V b.c.—List 5

someth. someth. = something

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

  1. B. = CDBuck, A Dictionary of Selected Synonyms—List 6

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 592
